itemDescriptionEN: Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto Di Calabria Eau de Toilette
title: Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto Di Calabria Eau de Toilette
description: Discover Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto di Calabria Eau de Toilette – a luxurious eau de toilette that captures the vibrant soul of southern Italy. Dive into a sensory escape with every spray.Sun-drenched citrus, bottled in blue!What is the story of Acqua di Parma Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto di Calabria Eau de Toilette?Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto di Calabria is an irresistible fragrance that tells the story of Calabria, where the golden bergamot fruit grows under the warm Mediterranean sun. This refined eau de toilette pays homage to nature’s brilliance and Italian craftsmanship, evoking sunlit coastlines and ocean breezes.Fragrance Features:Iconic Acqua di Parma bottle with Art Deco eleganceDeep blue glass inspired by the sea’s shimmering depthsFragrance Composition:Blu Mediterraneo Bergamotto di Calabria opens with the vibrant essence of Calabrian Bergamot PDO, celebrated for its Protected Designation of Origin status, ensuring the highest quality and authenticity. This luminous citrus accord is beautifully complemented by the zesty freshness of citron, creating an invigorating and sunny introduction. At the heart of the fragrance, the warmth of cedarwood blends seamlessly with the spicy brightness of red ginger. This unique combination adds both depth and a calming, aromatic character to the composition, evoking the natural richness of the Calabrian landscape. The base notes unfold into a sophisticated and sensual blend of earthy vetiver, resinous benzoin, and soft musk. Together, they create a lasting impression that is both elegant and comforting.

title: Pelvic Floor Exercisers for Women
description: The AMMO Pelvic Exercisers were developed to achieve the best results in strengthening the muscles of the pelvic floor and vaginal musculature.An effective training program!They are made of medical-grade silicone with a smooth and velvety texture to ensure maximum quality.Using them regularly, you can experience more controlled childbirth and postpartum, a more satisfying intimate life, and avoid urinary incontinence, as well as most common pelvic dysfunctions.Each set consists of three 33mm spheres, each with different weights of 20g, 30g, and 40g (allowing for up to 6 combinations with different weights), along with two grip handles, one single and one double.These exercises help improve muscle tone (the involuntary and unconscious tension a muscle exhibits when at rest). They are a perfect complement to Kegel exercises, which train muscle strength (conscious and voluntary contraction).They are especially recommended for:Preventive pelvic floor training before pregnancy planning.Care during menopause and premenopause, as muscles weaken with age.Women who regularly engage in high-impact sports or weightlifting (running, tennis, paddle, CrossFit, aerobics, weightlifting...).Women who suffer from constipation or chronic cough.Treatments for certain types of sexual dysfunctions.Increased sexual pleasure.

description: Discover Korloff Korlove Eau de Parfum, the seductive perfume by Korloff. A romantic and powdery scent crafted for the modern woman—sensual, elegant, and unforgettable.When Korloff Meets Love, Magic Unfolds!What is the story of Korloff Korlove Eau de Parfum?Korlove is more than a fragrance—it's a story of eternal passion. Crafted for the new generation of women, it reflects charm, elegance, and the fearless spirit of romance.Fragrance Features:Oriental, powdery scent with sensual vanilla and muskJewel-like bottle inspired by the Korloff black diamondFragrance Composition:The fragrance opens with a luminous blend of heliotrope, lily of the valley, and earthy moss. As the scent develops, it reveals a heart composed of radiant sun-kissed flowers, delicate orange blossom, and a whisper of sensual musk. These notes bloom gracefully, capturing the warmth and intimacy of a heartfelt connection. Finally, the base notes linger with a deep and comforting trail of creamy sandalwood, smooth white cedarwood, and rich vanilla. This lasting impression adds depth and sophistication, leaving behind a seductive aura that’s both elegant and unforgettable.

itemDescriptionEN: Fantasia Pop Surprise Eau de Toilette
title: Fantasia Pop Surprise Eau de Toilette
description: Unbox the unexpected with Anna Sui Fantasia POP Surprise Eau de Toilette – the playful new addition to her bestselling fragrance line. A colorful scent adventure awaits!Unbox the Magic! Wear the Surprise!What is the story of Anna Sui Fantasia POP Surprise Eau de Toilette?Fantasia POP Surprise! is the fifth and boldest launch in Anna Sui’s iconic Fantasia collection. Inspired by the electric energy of 1960s Pop Art, this fragrance is a whimsical throwback wrapped in four collectible mystery bottle designs. Each box is a color-packed surprise, waiting to reveal its hidden gem.Fragrance Features:4 Pop Art-inspired mystery bottle colorsGourmand scent: Wild Raspberry, Jasmine, Cotton Candy & DriftwoodRetro-fantasy aroma crafted by Jerome EpinetteLimited edition collector’s designFun, gift-ready surprise experienceFragrance Composition:The fragrance opens with a burst of juicy wild raspberry, creating a bright and tangy introduction that’s both playful and inviting. As the scent begins to unfold, the heart reveals a delicate floral bouquet. Jasmine sambac brings a lush, sensual depth, beautifully balanced by the airy freshness of blue cyclamen. Together, they create a dreamy, romantic core. Finally, the fragrance settles into a deliciously indulgent base. Sweet cotton candy evokes a sense of nostalgia, while ambroxan adds a warm, modern edge. Soft driftwoods ground the composition, leaving a lingering, comforting finish.

itemDescriptionEN: Art Deco Collector The Majestic Vanilla Eau de Parfum
title: Art Deco Collector The Majestic Vanilla Eau de Parfum
description: Step into the roaring twenties with Alexandre.J Art Deco Collector The Majestic Vanilla Eau de Parfum — a luxurious oriental fragrance celebrating timeless style and bold femininity.Discover the bold elegance!What is the story of Alexandre.J Art Deco Collector The Majestic Vanilla Eau de Parfum?Majestic Vanilla from the Art Deco Collection by Alexandre J pays tribute to the spirited women of the 1920s who redefined fashion and fragrance. Inspired by the first oriental scents of the era, this sophisticated perfume is housed in a dazzling blue flacon — a masterpiece of Art Deco design.Fragrance Features:Metallic blue bottle with Art Deco mesh and gold-plated detailingCelebrates bold femininity and vintage eleganceFragrance Composition:Majestic Vanilla unfolds with a vibrant and spicy opening, where the warmth of cinnamon is beautifully balanced by the zesty brightness of bergamot and mandarin. This lively introduction gives way to a rich heart, where the green, slightly resinous aroma of galbanum intertwines with the creamy sweetness of tonka bean and the juicy, velvety essence of ripe peach. As the fragrance settles, it reveals a sensual and earthy base composed of soft musk, the deep, amber-like character of labdanum, the woody richness of patchouli, and the smooth sweetness of vanilla. All of this is anchored by the warm, resinous depth of amber wood, creating a sophisticated and lasting impression that lingers on the skin like a signature.

As the fragrance settles, it reveals a sensual and earthy base composed of soft musk, the deep, amber-like character of labdanum, the woody richness of patchouli, and the smooth sweetness of vanilla. All of this is anchored by the warm, resinous depth of amber wood, creating a sophisticated and lasting impression that lingers on the skin like a signature.

title: Celebrate N.O.W. Eau de Parfum for Women
description: Celebrate N.O.W. Eau de Parfum is a modern feminine fragrance, an exquisite combination of fresh and spicy ginger blended with lush magnolia and sublimed with cinnamon and vanilla.   The promise of a celebration!   An intense perfume for women: the essence of femininity.  A glamorous, graceful ode to the beating heart of feminine power, Escada Celebrate N.O.W. Eau de Parfum is one of the most mesmerizing Escada perfume, with a vibrant message at its core: to celebrate the Nature Of Women.  N.O.W.: Nature of Woman, an elixir and intense interpretation of the essence of womankind, designed as an empowering, confidence-boosting veil of comforting strength to lead you through your day.  Because every day is a precious gift!  Empowered and free, this exhilarating perfume for women is luscious and deep, bold yet never brash, assertive without being overpowering.  A cloak of invincibility to drape over the skin and wear as a protective amulet. A joyous expression of living!  Fresh and zingy with an addictive floral heart, this artfully crafted fragrance is a sensual blend of delicate florals and warm, spicy accords for women unafraid of their own abilities and powers, driven on by a desire to live each moment to the max.  Brimming with intense, organic notes, this scent opens in a dazzling rush of hot and spicy ginger, providing an instant boost and sharpening the senses.  Voluptuous, sensual magnolia unfurls in the heart for a dense, sweet core, lent strength and power by cinnamon and tonka bean simmering at the base. Beautifully rounded and whole, like a precious drop of pure life to hold in the palm of your hand.  Celebrate N.O.W. Eau de Parfum is a powder-pink juice enclosed in a smooth, sensual bottle topped with a generous cap that embodies the transparency of the Escada woman.  A flutter of pink petals whirls across the bottle, capturing a rush of emotion, a fleeting moment, a soaring of the heart, and the fragrance within.  Boost intensity by applying this intense perfume to pulse points, focusing on the neck, décolletage, wrists, inner elbows and ankles - a gift to yourself.
